section_title: Possession of forged or counterfeit currency-notes or bank-notes
chapter_title: Of Offences Relating to Documents and to Property Marks
text: Whoever has in his possession any forged or counterfeit currency-note or bank-note, knowing or having reason to believe the same to be forged or counterfeit and intending to use the same as genuine or that it may be used as genuine, shall be punished with imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to seven years, or with fine, or with both.
